overall_strategy: Iteration 3 experiments definitively falsified UAD (F1=0.0005) and confirmed collision rate proxy (r=0.87). The root cause is token-level mutual exclusivity of absorption features. All planned experiments have been executed. The paper should be written from existing data as a negative result paper with constructive forward look.
key_assumptions: Collision rate is a validated proxy for absorption rate (r=0.869, n=56, CI=[0.780, 0.938])
UAD co-occurrence clustering cannot detect hierarchical absorption (F1=0.00048, identical to random)
Token-level mutual exclusivity is the structural root cause
All experiments complete - no further GPU experiments needed for this iteration

completed_tasks.name: Pilot P1: Collision Rate Proxy Validation
completed_tasks.result_summary: Spearman r=0.711, n=10, CI=[0.219, 0.887]. All 10 vowel pairs detected.

completed_tasks.name: Pilot P2: UAD Reproducibility
completed_tasks.result_summary: F1=0.0, Precision=0.0, Recall=0.143, 1/7 TP. UAD fails on pretrained SAE.

completed_tasks.name: Pilot P3: Random Baseline
completed_tasks.result_summary: UAD F1(0.00048) == Same-Cluster Random F1(0.00048). Zero value over random.

completed_tasks.name: Full F2: UAD Ablations
completed_tasks.result_summary: All variants fail. Best: K-means F1=0.0037, Recall=85.7% but 3237 FP.

completed_tasks.name: Full F4: Extended Collision Correlation
completed_tasks.result_summary: Spearman r=0.869, n=56, CI=[0.780, 0.938]. Validated across numbers and punctuation.

completed_tasks.name: Full F5: False Positive Analysis
completed_tasks.result_summary: 99.98% FP rate. Root cause: token-level mutual exclusivity.

completed_tasks.name: Main Results Analysis
completed_tasks.result_summary: PIVOT recommendation: negative result paper. UAD fails, proxy valid, root cause identified.

skipped_tasks.name: Full E1: UAD Multi-SAE Validation
skipped_tasks.reason: P2/P3 failure made this moot. UAD fails structurally, not due to SAE choice.

skipped_tasks.name: Full E3: UAD Multi-seed Reproducibility
skipped_tasks.reason: P2/P3 failure made this moot. UAD fails consistently.

skipped_tasks.name: Full E6: DFDA Validation
skipped_tasks.reason: UAD cannot identify absorption pairs, so DFDA has no input.

future_tasks.name: Pilot: Decoder Weight Similarity for Absorption Detection
future_tasks.description: Compute cosine similarity between SAE decoder weight vectors for known absorption pairs vs random pairs. Test hypothesis: absorption pairs have higher decoder cosine similarity than random pairs. Use the 7 known absorption pairs from number hierarchy + 93 random pairs (100 total).
pass_criteria: Mean cosine similarity of absorption pairs > mean of random pairs
future_tasks.fail_action: If decoder similarity does not distinguish absorption pairs, promote cand_c (collision rate standalone) or cand_d (causal intervention)

visualizations.description: Decoder cosine similarity: absorption pairs vs random pairs

future_tasks.name: Decoder Weight Similarity vs Collision Rate Correlation
future_tasks.description: Compute decoder cosine similarity for all 56 pairs from F4. Test correlation with collision rate and true absorption rate. Expected: decoder similarity correlates with both.
pass_criteria: Spearman r (decoder similarity vs true absorption) > 0.3
Spearman r (decoder similarity vs collision rate) > 0.3

visualizations.description: Decoder similarity vs collision rate vs true absorption (3D or faceted)

future_tasks.name: Pilot: Causal Intervention (Activation Patching)
future_tasks.description: Test 10 known absorption pairs + 10 random pairs with activation patching. Zero out child feature activations and measure parent feature recovery. Use TransformerLens HookPoints.
pass_criteria: Ablating absorbed child features increases parent feature activation
Effect size > 0.5 for absorption pairs vs random
future_tasks.fail_action: If causal intervention is inconclusive, focus on decoder weight similarity (cand_b) or collision rate standalone (cand_c)

visualizations.description: Parent feature activation change: absorption pairs vs random pairs

go_no_go_gates.condition: P3 (Random Baseline) UAD F1 - random F1 >= 0.3

pilot_decision.reason: All three pilots tell a clear story: (1) collision proxy is valid, (2) UAD fails structurally, (3) UAD equals random. The paper should be 'Why Co-occurrence Clustering Cannot Detect Feature Absorption'.

paper_positioning.title: Why Co-occurrence Clustering Cannot Detect Feature Absorption in Sparse Autoencoders
key_contributions: Empirical falsification: UAD F1 = 0.00048, identical to random baseline
Root cause: token-level mutual exclusivity of absorption features
Validated proxy: collision rate correlates with absorption at r = 0.87 (n=56)
Constructive proposals: decoder weight similarity and causal intervention as alternatives

risk_mitigation.mitigation: Acknowledge in limitations. The root cause (token-level mutual exclusivity) is architecture-independent.
Use exact counts, not rates. Report bootstrap CI. Be honest about statistical power.

risk_mitigation.risk: Negative result papers face publication bias
risk_mitigation.mitigation: Emphasize constructive contributions (validated proxy + proposed alternatives). Target venues that value negative results (e.g., ML Reproducibility track).

risk_mitigation.risk: Collision rate is still a proxy
risk_mitigation.mitigation: Clearly distinguish proxy from ground truth. Discuss when proxy may break down.

honesty_checklist: All numerical claims supported by non-empty result files
Negative results reported prominently with exact observed values
Statistical reports use effect sizes + CI, no p-values
